author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Committed ea272b13 on feature/752-hub-v3-write-path. Both implementation agents completed; director review found and fixed two defects in the parity check before commit: (1) false-FAIL after crosslink prune -- shadow events absent from v2 are now tolerated iff covered by the checkpoint watermark, with a regression test covering both the covered-PASS and uncovered-FAIL directions; (2) process::exit(1) buried in check_hubv3_parity made the FAIL path untestable and the agent's tamper test was vacuous (asserted bytes differ without calling the check) -- replaced with bail!/Err per integrity command conventions and rewrote the test to assert the check itself errors. Gates: fmt clean, clippy --all-targets -D warnings clean, 1935 lib + 2924 bin tests passing (+20 total). Soak: crosslink config set hub_v3.dual_write true locally post-merge, monitor via crosslink integrity hubv3 and .crosslink/hub-v3-shadow-stats.json. Awaiting push.
